Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision

Name: Total time spent in SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation across all cases

Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Average duration of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation compared to the duration of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion

Name: Elapsed time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Time from the last occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed to the start of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation

Name: Total time spent in SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation compared to the total time spent in SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
